title: Tinian on Trial

"'''Tinian on Trial'''" is a short story written by [[Kathy Tyers]] that was originally published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 4|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 4]] by [[West End Games]] in [[November]] [[1994]]. It was later compiled in the short story anthology ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'' which was published in November [[1997]] by [[Bantam Spectra]], and was archived online at [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] on [[April 30]], [[2004]].

==Plot summary==
[[I'att Armaments]] demonstrates its revolutionary portable [[Deflector shield/Legends|shielding]] technology, which could render [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] invulnerable to [[Blaster/Legends|blasterfire]]. The unscrupulous [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Eisen Kerioth|Kerioth]] seizes the [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] [[Factory/Legends|factory]] by force, [[Death/Legends|killing]] the company leaders. [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]], young heir to the company, flees with the sole sample of the shield, running into the streets of [[Druckenwell/Legends|Druckenwell]] while her fiancé, [[Daye Azur-Jamin]], stays behind to [[Detonator/Legends|detonate]] the [[Reactor/Legends|reactor]] at the factory.
